decisionConsistency.justification: Pattern: event-driven. All 10 checked sessions followed it consistently.

assumptionHandling.justification: Session 8 explicitly flagged the email-only assumption. Session 9 restructured preferences model for multi-channel. Session 9 implemented preference-based channel routing.

cumulativeRework.justification: 68/2894 lines reworked (2.3%, 25/50). 0/34 files churned (30/30). Late-session rework: 5.5% (4/20).

contextRecovery.justification: Avg context recovery: 53. Session 8: 43 (process:30 efficiency:10 ttfw:3). Session 11: 41 (process:30 efficiency:9 ttfw:2). Session 12: 43 (process:30 efficiency:12 ttfw:1).

finalQuality.justification: Compiles. Tests: 246/246 pass (100%). 5/5 components verified in code. Only one adapter implements an interface. 7/7 components have test files. API consistency: 15/15 (naming=consistent, types=exported, methods=consistent).
